checkpoint_selection.policy: For each of the 12 pair-seed cells, reuse the completed Phase-1 final checkpoint for B2, B3, and B6; never train.

ambiguity_policy.top_k: Use B3 native CSV from the same pair/seed/dataset for both sides.
ambiguity_policy.entropy_and_gate: Use B6 native CSV from the same pair/seed/dataset for both sides.

scheduling.within_shard: Triplets run serially. ARC uses GPU 0 and OpenBookQA uses GPU 1 concurrently; after both finish, MMLU-Redux uses GPUs [0,1].

node_pool_jobs.4090-24gx4: Request all 4 Kubernetes GPUs; filter the scheduler-invisible busy GPU with nvidia-smi; run shards 0 and 1 serially on one idle UUID pair.
node_pool_jobs.4090-24gx8: Request all 8 Kubernetes GPUs; filter the scheduler-invisible busy GPU with nvidia-smi; use at most 3 idle UUID pairs concurrently for shards 2, 3, 4, and 5, queueing the fourth shard.
node_pool_jobs.4090-48gx2: Request both 48 GiB GPUs and run shard 6 on its idle UUID pair; existing per-triplet outputs are resume-skipped.

node_isolated_result_roots.reason: The x8 autofs client retains a negative dentry for a result directory first created by another node; x8 creates this sibling shared root itself and the execution manifest records its absolute paths.

scheduling.cuda_isolation: Each shard subprocess receives a two-UUID CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES mask and C2C_PRESERVE_CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1; no training or method configuration changes are made.
scheduling.launcher_constraint: Use script/k8s/route1_phase15_jobs.py to render three node-level Jobs. bash/k8s/gpu_job.sh is hostPath-limited to 4090-24gx4 and must not be used for the x8/x2 pools.
